item.title: The Number Dealers Use to Trap Buyers
item.description: Once you know why they ask, the whole pitch changes. A closer look at dealer questions, car buying tips, and auto finance. What should buyers watch for?

media:content.media:title: The Number Dealers Use to Trap Buyers
media:content.media:description: Once you know why they ask, the whole pitch changes. A closer look at dealer questions, car buying tips, and auto finance. What should buyers watch for?

item.title: The Number That Can Change the Deal
item.description: A closer look at the line buyers may overlook at signing and how it can affect the final deal. What should car shoppers review before they sign?

media:content.media:title: The Number That Can Change the Deal
media:content.media:description: A closer look at the line buyers may overlook at signing and how it can affect the final deal. What should car shoppers review before they sign?

item.title: Why Dealers Remove the Sticker on Used Cars
item.description: A closer look at why dealers may remove the sticker on a used car and what buyers should notice before making a purchase. What details should you check first when shopping for a used car?

media:content.media:title: Why Dealers Remove the Sticker on Used Cars
media:content.media:description: A closer look at why dealers may remove the sticker on a used car and what buyers should notice before making a purchase. What details should you check first when shopping for a used car?

item.title: Tesla Owners Miss This One Detail
item.description: Worth knowing before you trust the dashboard. A quick reminder for Tesla owners and shoppers to look beyond the display when evaluating features and information. What should buyers check first?

media:content.media:title: Tesla Owners Miss This One Detail
media:content.media:description: Worth knowing before you trust the dashboard. A quick reminder for Tesla owners and shoppers to look beyond the display when evaluating features and information. What should buyers check first?

item.title: What Car Listings May Leave Out
item.description: Before you trust the price, look for what the listing left out. Check the details behind the number, including fees and other terms, before you compare offers. What should buyers look for first?

media:content.media:title: What Car Listings May Leave Out
media:content.media:description: Before you trust the price, look for what the listing left out. Check the details behind the number, including fees and other terms, before you compare offers. What should buyers look for first?

item.title: Why Some Used Cars Get Passed Over
item.description: A look at why certain used cars are ignored by buyers and how hidden value can sometimes be found in vehicles others skip.

media:content.media:title: Why Some Used Cars Get Passed Over
media:content.media:description: A look at why certain used cars are ignored by buyers and how hidden value can sometimes be found in vehicles others skip.

item.title: Tesla Setup That Can Lead to Higher Costs
item.description: A closer look at Tesla ownership decisions and settings that could impact expenses over time, helping owners understand potential costs before they add up.

media:content.media:title: Tesla Setup That Can Lead to Higher Costs
media:content.media:description: A closer look at Tesla ownership decisions and settings that could impact expenses over time, helping owners understand potential costs before they add up.

item.title: One Move Buyers Should Never Ignore Before Signing
item.description: A look at the one move buyers should never ignore before signing, with a focus on dealership pricing and hidden fees. What should car buyers check before they sign?

media:content.media:title: One Move Buyers Should Never Ignore Before Signing
media:content.media:description: A look at the one move buyers should never ignore before signing, with a focus on dealership pricing and hidden fees. What should car buyers check before they sign?

item.title: Classic Sales Trick That Can Hurt Buyers
item.description: A look at a classic sales trick that can make the numbers get ugly if it is not caught early. What should buyers watch for before signing?

media:content.media:title: Classic Sales Trick That Can Hurt Buyers
media:content.media:description: A look at a classic sales trick that can make the numbers get ugly if it is not caught early. What should buyers watch for before signing?

item.title: Hidden Fees and Buyer Protection at the Dealership
item.description: A closer look at how hidden fees can become a dealership issue, and why the paper trail matters when buying a car. What should buyers check before signing?

media:content.media:title: Hidden Fees and Buyer Protection at the Dealership
media:content.media:description: A closer look at how hidden fees can become a dealership issue, and why the paper trail matters when buying a car. What should buyers check before signing?

item.title: Detail That Exposes the Whole Play
item.description: A closer look at the setup behind a car deal and the detail that changes the picture. What should buyers watch for when comparing trade-ins and dealer offers?
